classic.svg: <svg width="{{totalWidth}}" height="20" viewBox="0 0 {{totalWidth}} 20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="{{labelWidth}}" height="20" fill="#555" /><rect x="{{labelWidth}}" width="{{countWidth}}" height="20" fill="#2563eb" /><text x="{{labelCenterX}}" y="14" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#fff">{{label}}</text><g stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" transform="translate({{iconX}}, 2) scale(0.66)">{{iconPath}}</g><text x="{{countX}}" y="14" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#fff" font-weight="bold">{{count}}</text></svg>

flat.svg: <svg width="{{totalWidth}}" height="20" viewBox="0 0 {{totalWidth}} 20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><linearGradient id="b" x2="0" y2="100%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#bbb" stop-opacity=".1"/><stop offset="1" stop-opacity=".1"/></linearGradient><clipPath id="a"><rect width="{{totalWidth}}" height="20" rx="3" fill="#fff"/></clipPath><g clip-path="url(#a)"><path fill="#555" d="M0 0h{{labelWidth}}v20H0z"/><path fill="#2563eb" d="M{{labelWidth}} 0h{{countWidth}}v20H{{labelWidth}}z"/><path fill="url(#b)" d="M0 0h{{totalWidth}}v20H0z"/></g><g fill="#fff" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Verdana,Geneva,DejaVu Sans,sans-serif" text-rendering="geometricPrecision" font-size="11"><text x="{{labelCenterX}}" y="15" fill="#010101" fill-opacity=".3">{{label}}</text><text x="{{labelCenterX}}" y="14">{{label}}</text><text x="{{countCenterX}}" y="15" fill="#010101" fill-opacity=".3">{{count}}</text><text x="{{countCenterX}}" y="14" font-weight="bold">{{count}}</text></g></svg>

minimal.svg: <svg width="{{countWidth}}" height="20" viewBox="0 0 {{countWidth}} 20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="{{countWidth}}" height="20" rx="3" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><g stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" transform="translate(6, 2) scale(0.66)">{{iconPath}}</g><text x="24" y="14" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#0f172a" font-weight="bold">{{count}}</text></svg>

glass.svg: <svg width="{{totalWidth}}" height="28" viewBox="0 0 {{totalWidth}} 28" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="g" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.2"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.05"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="{{totalWidth}}" height="28" rx="6" fill="#0f172a"/><rect width="{{totalWidth}}" height="28" rx="6" fill="url(#g)" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="{{labelCenterX}}" y="18" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8" font-weight="bold">{{label}}</text><g stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" transform="translate({{iconX}}, 6) scale(0.66)">{{iconPath}}</g><text x="{{countX}}" y="18" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#f8fafc" font-weight="bold">{{count}}</text></svg>

neon.svg: <svg width="{{totalWidth}}" height="28" viewBox="0 0 {{totalWidth}} 28" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="g" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.2"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.05"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="{{totalWidth}}" height="28" rx="6" fill="#0f172a"/><rect width="{{totalWidth}}" height="28" rx="6" fill="url(#g)" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="{{labelCenterX}}" y="18" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8" font-weight="bold">{{label}}</text><g stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" transform="translate({{iconX}}, 6) scale(0.66)">{{iconPath}}</g><text x="{{countX}}" y="18" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#f8fafc" font-weight="bold">{{count}}</text></svg>
